name: NexCampus v2.3.9
changelog: Code Lab layout fixed — tab pane now fills full height, side-by-side works properly
Mind map rendering fixed — clear background, drop shadows on nodes, proper visibility
Global search — type any tool name, press Enter to navigate directly
Weekly content delivery system — auto-receives new guides, challenges, themes
8 auto-graded Python challenges with instant scoring
Procedural planet textures, lens flare, 900 stars for Solar System
Neon Tokyo + Midnight Purple themes (8 total)
